title: Korak 9

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
class Email:
    def __init__(self, sender, receiver, subject, body):
        self.sender = sender
        self.receiver = receiver
        self.subject = subject
        self.body = body
        self.read = False

    def mark_as_read(self):
        self.read = True

email_obj = Email('alice@example.com', 'bob@example.com', 'Hello', 'Hi Bob!')
print(email_obj.sender)
print(email_obj.subject)
print(email_obj.read)
email_obj.mark_as_read()
print(email_obj.read)
challengeFiles.seed:
class Email:
    def __init__(self, sender, receiver, subject, body):
        self.sender = sender
        self.receiver = receiver
        self.subject = subject
        self.body = body
        self.read = False

    def mark_as_read(self):
        self.read = True

email_obj = Email('alice@example.com', 'bob@example.com', 'Hello', 'Hi Bob!')
print(email_obj.sender)
print(email_obj.subject)
print(email_obj.read)
email_obj.mark_as_read()
print(email_obj.read)

tests.text: Ne bi trebalo da imate liniju za kreiranje email_obj u vašem kodu.
Ne bi trebalo da imaš print(email_obj.sender) u svom kodu.
Ne bi trebalo da imaš print(email_obj.read) u svom kodu.
Ne bi trebalo da imaš email_obj.mark_as_read() u svom kodu.

description: Uklonite email_obj sa stabla za štampanje sledećih.
